narration: Define a try-except block to handle errors and exceptions in Python.
Comment out the else and finally clauses for now.
Explain the purpose of using try-except blocks to handle anticipated errors.
Run code that attempts to open a file without the underscore to trigger a FileNotFound error.
Observe the verbose traceback output displayed when a file is not found.
Move the file-opening code into the try block.
Write a custom error message inside the except block.
Explain the difference between specific and general exception handling.
Demonstrate that a general except clause catches both FileNotFound and NameError exceptions.
Refactor the except clause to catch only FileNotFoundError.
Add a second except clause to catch a general Exception.
Explain the importance of ordering specific exceptions before general ones.
Modify the except blocks to print the exception object using 'as e'.
Explain the purpose of the else and finally blocks.
Uncomment the else clause.
Define a try-except block to handle errors and exceptions in Python.
Comment out the else and finally clauses for now.
Explain the purpose of using try-except blocks to handle anticipated errors.
Run code that attempts to open a file without the underscore to trigger a FileNotFound error.
Observe the verbose traceback output displayed when a file is not found.
Move the file-opening code into the try block.
Write a custom error message inside the except block.
Explain the difference between specific and general exception handling.
Demonstrate that a general except clause catches both FileNotFound and NameError exceptions.
Refactor the except clause to catch only FileNotFoundError.
Add a second except clause to catch a general Exception.
Explain the importance of ordering specific exceptions before general ones.
Modify the except blocks to print the exception object using 'as e'.
Uncomment the else clause.
Explain that the else clause runs only if no exception is raised.
Move file reading and closing code into the else clause.
Explain the purpose of the finally clause to ensure resource cleanup.
Add a print statement in the finally clause to demonstrate execution.
Show that the finally clause executes whether an exception occurs or not.
Modify the try block to manually raise an exception.
Explain how to use the 'raise' statement to trigger exceptions.
Demonstrate that manually raised exceptions are caught by the except block.
Show that code after the try-except-else-finally block executes normally.
